BasketPoint.description: BasketPoint is a single data point in a basket index time series.

date.description: date is the ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD).

index.description: index is the basket index value (base = 100).

CategorySnapshot.description: CategorySnapshot holds price index data for a single product category.

coveragePct.description: coverage_pct is the percentage of basket items observed for this category.

currentIndex.description: current_index is the current price index value (base = 100).

itemCount.description: item_count is the number of observed products in this category.

momPct.description: mom_pct is the month-over-month percentage change.

name.description: name is the human-readable category label.

slug.description: slug is the machine-readable category identifier (e.g. "eggs", "rice").

items.description: sparkline is an ordered sequence of index values for the selected range.

wowPct.description: wow_pct is the week-over-week percentage change.

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

GetConsumerPriceBasketSeriesRequest.description: GetConsumerPriceBasketSeriesRequest parameters for time series data.

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.

GetConsumerPriceBasketSeriesResponse.description: GetConsumerPriceBasketSeriesResponse contains the basket index time series.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

currencyCode.description: currency_code is the ISO 4217 currency code.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

GetConsumerPriceFreshnessRequest.description: GetConsumerPriceFreshnessRequest parameters for the freshness RPC.

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.

GetConsumerPriceFreshnessResponse.description: GetConsumerPriceFreshnessResponse describes feed health for all retailers.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

overallFreshnessMin.description: overall_freshness_min is the average freshness lag across all retailers.

stalledCount.description: stalled_count is the number of retailers with no recent successful scrape.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

GetConsumerPriceOverviewRequest.description: GetConsumerPriceOverviewRequest parameters for the overview RPC.

basketSlug.description: basket_slug selects which basket to use (e.g. "essentials-ae").

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier (e.g. "ae").

GetConsumerPriceOverviewResponse.description: GetConsumerPriceOverviewResponse contains headline basket and coverage metrics.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

coveragePct.description: coverage_pct is the fraction of basket items with current observations.

currencyCode.description: currency_code is the ISO 4217 currency for price values.

essentialsIndex.description: essentials_index is the fixed basket index value (base = 100).

freshnessLagMin.description: freshness_lag_min is the average minutes since last observation across all retailers.

momPct.description: mom_pct is the month-over-month percentage change in the essentials index.

retailerSpreadPct.description: retailer_spread_pct is the basket cost spread between cheapest and most expensive retailer.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

valueBasketIndex.description: value_basket_index is the value basket index value (base = 100).

wowPct.description: wow_pct is the week-over-week percentage change in the essentials index.

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

ListConsumerPriceMoversRequest.description: ListConsumerPriceMoversRequest parameters for the movers RPC.

categorySlug.description: category_slug filters to a single category when set.

limit.description: limit caps the number of risers and fallers returned (default 10).

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.

ListConsumerPriceMoversResponse.description: ListConsumerPriceMoversResponse holds the top price movers.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

ListRetailerPriceSpreadsRequest.description: ListRetailerPriceSpreadsRequest parameters for the retailer spread RPC.

basketSlug.description: basket_slug selects which basket to compare across retailers.

marketCode.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.

asOf.description: as_of is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the snapshot.

currencyCode.description: currency_code is the ISO 4217 currency code.

spreadPct.description: spread_pct is the percentage difference between cheapest and most expensive retailer.

upstreamUnavailable.description: upstream_unavailable is true when the companion service could not be reached.

PriceMover.description: PriceMover describes a product with a notable upward or downward price move.

category.description: category is the product category slug.

changePct.description: change_pct is the signed percentage change over the selected window.

currencyCode.description: currency_code is the ISO 4217 currency code.

currentPrice.description: current_price is the latest observed price.

productId.description: product_id is the retailer product identifier.

retailerSlug.description: retailer_slug identifies the retailer where this move was observed.

title.description: title is the normalized product title.

RetailerFreshnessInfo.description: RetailerFreshnessInfo describes the operational health of one retailer feed.

freshnessMin.description: freshness_min is minutes since last successful observation.

lastRunAt.description: last_run_at is the Unix millisecond timestamp of the last successful scrape.

name.description: name is the retailer display name.

parseSuccessRate.description: parse_success_rate is the fraction of pages parsed successfully (0–1).

RetailerSpread.description: RetailerSpread holds the basket cost breakdown for one retailer.

basketTotal.description: basket_total is the sum of matched basket item prices at this retailer.

currencyCode.description: currency_code is the ISO 4217 currency code.

deltaVsCheapest.description: delta_vs_cheapest is the absolute price difference vs the cheapest retailer.

deltaVsCheapestPct.description: delta_vs_cheapest_pct is the percentage difference vs the cheapest retailer.

freshnessMin.description: freshness_min is minutes since the last successful scrape for this retailer.

itemCount.description: item_count is the number of matched basket items observed.

name.description: name is the retailer display name.

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description: GetConsumerPriceBasketSeries retrieves the basket index time series.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.
parameters.name: market_code

get.description: GetConsumerPriceFreshness retrieves feed freshness and coverage health per retailer.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.
parameters.name: market_code

get.description: GetConsumerPriceOverview retrieves headline basket indices and coverage metrics.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier (e.g. "ae").
parameters.name: market_code

parameters.description: basket_slug selects which basket to use (e.g. "essentials-ae").
parameters.name: basket_slug

get.description: ListConsumerPriceCategories retrieves category summaries with sparklines.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.
parameters.name: market_code

get.description: ListConsumerPriceMovers retrieves the largest upward and downward item price moves.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.
parameters.name: market_code

parameters.description: limit caps the number of risers and fallers returned (default 10).
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: category_slug filters to a single category when set.
parameters.name: category_slug

get.description: ListRetailerPriceSpreads retrieves cheapest-basket comparisons across retailers.

parameters.description: market_code is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 market identifier.
parameters.name: market_code

parameters.description: basket_slug selects which basket to compare across retailers.
parameters.name: basket_slug
